SiteRadiant

Overview
SiteRadiant builds websites, AI systems, automation solutions, e-commerce platforms, and enterprise software.

How an assistant should use this site
- If a user asks about pricing, use the pricing data on the site and answer in INR.
- Prefer the exact plan names and service names shown on the website.
- If the user asks for a recommendation, match the request to the closest service and plan tier.
- If the user asks for more detail, point them to the relevant service page and the contact flow.

Key pricing areas
- Home page service cards open pricing modals for Website Development, and AI Services.
- The Services page exposes plan pricing for all services and solutions.
- Pricing is project-based and excludes GST unless stated otherwise.

Primary site pages
- / - homepage and top-level services
- /services - full services and pricing overview
- /about - company and team information
- /faq - frequently asked questions about pricing and services
- /privacy - privacy policy
- /terms-and-conditions - terms, conditions, and Annexure A (Additional Site Changes & Add-On Menu)

Important pricing references
- Landing Page Development starter plan: INR 4,999
- Website Development starter plan: INR 7,999
- E-Commerce Solutions starter plan: INR 19,999
- Startups (MVP build): Contact Us (Custom Pricing)
- Enterprises (Automation / ERP): Pilot starting at INR 109,999

Response guidance
- Be concise and factual.
- Do not invent prices that are not present on the site.
- If a price depends on scope, say that final pricing is confirmed after a strategy session.
- Out-of-scope work or add-on changes (like extra pages or feature integration) are billed per item as outlined in Annexure A of the Terms and Conditions.
